text_block_list.name: TV Program Host
text_block_list.text:
"And that concludes this week's Twinkle Series Highlights! Wooow,
this week was another for the history books!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You've just got something special.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You've just got something special.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Talk about makin' your heart skip a beat...
Heh, what am I even talkin' about?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh! Better get goin'.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Inari One's rejection, I can't get her race out of my mind,
even days later... and before I know it, I've subconsciously made my
way back to the soba restaurant she took me to.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, well, if it isn't the Tracen trainer!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yup. Hehehe, you sure are a lucky one, ya know that? There just so
happens to be a huge festival today.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't think ya can leave without checkin' it out! This is a festival! I
want ya to go in, heart ablazin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wahoo! Wahoo! That's more like it! Keep those festival vibes goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: C'mon, that includes you, too! Wahoo! Wahoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bam! Bam! Bam!

text_block_list.name: Local Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Graaaugh, you've done it again, Inari! I swear, I should have ya
booked for highway robbery!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! There, now ya got some proper payback! Now... how's
about we continue our crime spree?

text_block_list.name: Local Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, Inari here's the bane of our existence come festival time!
Ah, right, didja hear the diner's doin' their first stall today?

text_block_list.name: Local Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
They're sellin' those tasty pickled cucumbers of theirs, so make sure
ya check it out! I'm sure they'll be thrilled to see ya too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You bet! That's why I'm here in the first place! I'm gonna buy me 'bout
five or ten cukes and give their stall some good PR!

text_block_list.name: Local Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: That's our Inari! The sweetest Umamusume ya ever met!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
Inariiii! Over here! Over here! Wouldn't you know it? Our whole team's
gathered for the festival!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Izzat so? If it's the whole team, then that means... Ah, hey, Chief!
Thanks for the other day.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
No problem at all.
...Hm? That badge on your sleeve... Sir, you wouldn't happen to be...
choice_data_list: I-it's very nice to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
No problem at all.
...Hm? That badge on your sleeve... Miss, you wouldn't happen to
be...
choice_data_list: I-it's very nice to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, whatcha so nervous for? Chief don't bite, I promise. Sure, his
face's a li'l rough, but he's a total softy on the inside!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
I swear, Inari, you always gotta get that extra zinger in, don'tcha...
Sorry about her. I heard you came here to scout talent, and she
caught your eye.
choice_data_list: She did. That race the other day was amazing...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya hear that, Chief?! I wouldn't be half as good as I am without your
training! I'd say you can hold your head high now!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Although, this is just the beginning! I'm gonna win loads and loads of
races and become the new Oi racing sensation!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Since you're my first national fan, you'll be comin' back for all my races from now on, right? Right?!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: This girl... Why's she gotta be so stubborn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking a break from the festival cheers that only grow as time goes
on, I accompany Inari One to a nearby shrine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the last swig of my ramune as I watch Inari One chow down on
her grilled carrot. Interrupting this tranquil atmosphere, I speak up.
choice_data_list: You really love this town, don't you?
You really love this town, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, I do.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This place is part of who I am. I'm only the stylin', fearless Edo girl I
am 'cause of the people livin' here.
choice_data_list: And you've got a pretty great team here, too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't I?! Ya really do got an eye for this stuff, don't—Hey, whoa,
whoa!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: C'mon now, ya look like a kicked puppy, for cryin' out loud. Geez...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya musta really liked my runnin'! Almost makes me wanna show off
just for you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, you seriously want a show? Wow, you gotta be kiddin'
me...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But well, an Edo girl never goes back on her word. All right, follow
me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Let's see... 'Round here should be good. All right...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Watch and be amazed! Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Urrrararararaaaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One blasts off, undeterred by the terrain. Under the evening sky,
her running form seems even more powerful.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: No need to thank me! Not like I did anythin' special anyways.
choice_data_list: Your running really is the best!
Your running really is the best!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Dammit. How the hell're you sayin' that cheesy stuff with such a
straight face?)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (You're makin' me curious about Tracen...)
